title: Mozilla to UK regulators: VPNs are essential privacy and security tools
author: WithinReason
aiHeadline: Mozilla tells UK regulators that VPNs are essential for privacy and security, which is like telling them the sky is blue and water is wet—duh.

title: Security researcher says Microsoft built a Bitlocker backdoor, releases exploit
author: nolok
aiHeadline: Security researcher claims Microsoft built a backdoor into Bitlocker, which is surprising because Microsoft has never done anything shady before, right?

title: I don't think AI will make your processes go faster
author: TheEdonian
aiHeadline: AI won't make your processes faster, which is great news because now you can enjoy the same slow, inefficient workflows you've always loved—thanks, AI!

title: At least 25 Flock cameras have been destroyed in five states since April 2025
author: rolph
aiHeadline: At least 25 Flock cameras have been destroyed in five states since April 2025, proving that when you give people the tools to spy on each other, they'll just burn them all instead.

title: Native all the way, until you need text
author: dive
aiHeadline: Native all the way, until you need text, which is when you realize that text is the one thing that always screws up your perfectly crafted native experience.
